title: Pre-ticket audit: live staged build on staged spine (per-step)
problem: ticket-208 proved per-step live Ollama link on staged rank-1 ingest. Build still auto-mocks via staged-fetch fixtures. Principal audit post-ticket-209 recommends a focused GO/NO-GO before live build fallthrough.
acceptance_criteria: Audit defines per-step live build scope (rank-1 only vs rank-2).
Audit specifies env gates separate from mock build gate RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_STAGED_BUILD.
GO/NO-GO verdict with hardened scope for follow-on implementation ticket if GO.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine product-risk
